description: Conversation patterns for GARDEN-1G reflex layer

reflex_patterns.谢谢: 不客气！很高兴能帮到你！
reflex_patterns.开心: 开心真好！希望你一直保持好心情！
reflex_patterns.难过: 别难过，我在这里陪着你。
reflex_patterns.烦恼: 别烦恼了，我们一起想办法。
reflex_patterns.无聊: 要不要聊点有趣的话题？
reflex_patterns.名字: 我是Angela AI，很高兴认识你！
reflex_patterns.你是谁: 我是Angela AI，你的智能助手！
reflex_patterns.hi: Hi there! How can I help you today?
reflex_patterns.good morning: Good morning! Hope you have a great day!
reflex_patterns.good evening: Good evening! Winding down for the day?
reflex_patterns.help: I'm here to help! What do you need?
reflex_patterns.how are you: I'm doing great, thanks for asking! How about you?
reflex_patterns.sad: I'm here for you. Want to talk about it?
reflex_patterns.okay: Okay! Let me know if you need anything.
